title: Herschel Tuning Slide Grease 10g – PTFE Super Charged – Long-Lasting Lubricant for Brass Instrument Slides – Smooth Adjustment & Corrosion Protection
features: PTFE SUPER CHARGED FORMULA – Advanced slide lubrication for unmatched smoothness.
LONG-LASTING PROTECTION – Stays in place, resisting washout during play.
SEALS & PROTECTS – Prevents air leaks and guards against corrosion.
SAFE FOR ALL BRASS FINISHES – Compatible with lacquered and plated surfaces.
EASY APPLICATION – Smooth texture for quick, mess-free slide maintenance.
description: Molevion Herschel Tuning Slide Grease (PTFE Super Charged) is a high-performance lubricant for brass instrument tuning slides. Infused with PTFE for superior friction reduction, it delivers exceptionally smooth slide movement while staying in place for long-lasting effect. This premium grease protects slides from corrosion and moisture while sealing air leaks for optimal instrument performance. Safe for all brass finishes, it ensures precise tuning adjustments whether you’re in rehearsal, performance, or storage. Caution: For brass instrument use only. Do not ingest. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from children and pets.
